results.engine_gap: ward + activated {3}{W} self-pump (X = own toughness)
results.notes: Pure Ward static + activated ability; nothing trigger-shaped to wire.

results.engine_gap: activated {2},{T}: tap target non-Mount creature
results.notes: Single tap-activated targeting ability; activation pipeline missing.

results.engine_gap: menace static + activated {1}{B}+sac for +1/+1 counter (and Treasure if outlaw)
results.notes: Whole effect is an activated sacrifice ability.

results.engine_gap: graveyard-copy-cast flow (cast a copy from gy, optional 'may') not engine-tracked
results.notes: Crime trigger -> opens a target_with_callback over black cards in your graveyard; on selection emits EXILE + LIFE_CHANGE -2 (the 'lose 2 life if you cast the copy' rider, simplified to fire unconditionally on exile).

results.engine_gap: activated {1},{T}: 1 damage to target opponent
results.notes: Reach is a printed keyword; the only ability is tap-activated targeting damage.

results.engine_gap: no native modal-with-targeting at beginning of combat
results.notes: Beginning-of-combat REACT (PHASE_START / COMBAT_DECLARED for active player). Opens target_with_callback over creatures you control; default mode = +2/+0 UEOT; mode 1 grants menace+haste UEOT.

results.engine_gap: 'becomes the target of an opponent's spell or ability' trigger not engine-tracked
results.notes: Trigger condition is the same target-of-opponent hook required for ward; no event for it yet.

results.engine_gap: true 'double the +1/+1 counters on target' (we approximate by adding a fresh batch equal to current counters)
results.notes: Two interceptors: (1) beginning-of-combat REACT opens a target_with_callback that puts a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control; (2) saddled-attack via make_saddle_trigger opens a target_with_callback that adds counters equal to the target's current +1/+1 count (engine has no first-class doubler). Saddle threshold set to 2.

results.engine_gap: ward + activated {1}{G},Discard: tutor basic land or Desert and gain 3 life
results.notes: Reach is a printed keyword; ward static and activated tutor remain unsupported.

results.engine_gap: activated {1}+sac: destroy target artifact/enchantment
results.notes: Vigilance is a printed keyword; only ability is activated sacrifice destroy.

results.engine_gap: granting an activated tap ability to nontoken creatures (also: target-token-that-entered-this-turn provenance)
results.notes: Haste is printed; the static is an activated-ability grant.

results.engine_gap: cross-library cast permission ('mana of any type') + 'creatures you control but don't own are Mercenaries' type override
results.notes: Upkeep trigger emitting EXILE_FROM_TOP from the first opposing player's library, count = number of outlaws you control (uses the existing OUTLAW_TYPES/is_outlaw helper).

results.engine_gap: optional graveyard-exile + creature-copy rider not engine-tracked
results.notes: Crime trigger (once per turn) -> +1/+1 counter on Lazav. The 'may exile a card from a graveyard / become a copy if creature' rider remains unwired.

results.engine_gap: replace 'spell goes to graveyard on resolve' with 'exile and become plotted' for multicolored instants/sorceries; prowess static
results.notes: Replacement on cast resolution + plot-on-resolve composition not engine-tracked.

results.engine_gap: planeswalker loyalty abilities and copy-of-creature transform
results.notes: Whole card is loyalty abilities; planeswalker subsystem missing.

results.engine_gap: cross-library cast permission ('mana of any type') + activated sac-for-indestructible (once per turn)
results.notes: ZONE_CHANGE-with-cause=='sacrifice' filter (creature, controller's, not self) -> EXILE_FROM_TOP from the first opposing player's library, count = sacrificed creature's MV (using src.engine.library_search._mana_value).

results.engine_gap: modal-spell mode count not exposed on CAST events; per-mode loop unsupported
results.notes: Trigger key is 'X = number of modes chosen on the triggering spell' which the engine does not surface.

results.engine_gap: activated {X},{T} damage-replacement scaling (this-turn replacement) remains unwired
results.notes: REACT-priority interceptor on DAMAGE: source-controller is Taii's controller, target is a creature on the battlefield, is_combat is False, amount == target's toughness (using get_toughness) -> draw a card.

results.engine_gap: activated {2},{T},remove-two-loot-counters: draw a card
results.notes: Crime trigger (once per turn) -> add a 'loot' counter on this artifact. The activated draw remains unwired.

results.engine_gap: activated {6},{T},sac: triple-modal targeted destruction
results.notes: Single activated multi-target destroy ability.

results.engine_gap: equipment static (+1/+0, haste, ward {1}) + Equip {1}
results.notes: Pure equipment with attachment-bound bonuses.

results.engine_gap: activated {2}: target graveyard card to bottom of library
results.notes: Single activated graveyard-targeting ability.

results.engine_gap: activated land ability {3},{T}: target creature can't block this turn (sorcery speed)
results.notes: Pure activated land ability.

engine_fix.description: Function returned dead leftover code from make_saga_setup (referenced undefined names saga_id / controller_id / chapter_filter / chapter_handler) instead of building and returning its single trigger Interceptor. Every crime-trigger card raised NameError at setup time. Replaced the trailing block with a proper Interceptor(...) return statement (REACT priority, while_on_battlefield).
